# __SKILL_NAME__

> __SKILL_TAGLINE__. Installs as an agent skill.

TODO — one paragraph: what problem this replaces, the workflow it runs (stages/strategies, in
order), and what "read only what you need" the router gives you. Claude Code is the reference
host; it's plain Agent Skills format (agentskills.io), so it installs on Codex, Cursor,
Antigravity, opencode, Grok Build, and Hermes too.

## Install

- npm/skills.sh: `npx skills add gabros20/__REPO_NAME__`
- Clone + installer (per-host targets: claude | codex | cursor | antigravity | opencode | grok | hermes | agents | all): `git clone https://github.com/gabros20/__REPO_NAME__ && cd __REPO_NAME__ && ./install.sh codex`
- Manual copy: `cp -R skills/__SKILL_NAME__ ~/.claude/skills/__SKILL_NAME__`

## Docs

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/__REPO_NAME__/main/README.md): overview, install, workflow, and repository map.
- [skills/__SKILL_NAME__/SKILL.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/__REPO_NAME__/main/skills/__SKILL_NAME__/SKILL.md): runtime router, workflow, artifact contract, and completion rules.
- [docs/installation.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/__REPO_NAME__/main/docs/installation.md): installation and verification by client.
- [docs/usage.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/__REPO_NAME__/main/docs/usage.md): activation boundary, routes, outputs, and completion.
- [docs/recipes.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gabros20/__REPO_NAME__/main/docs/recipes.md): representative starting prompts.
